title: Retro 1.5.2 Minecraft Vibes
description: A resource pack that combines several packs to bring Minecraft’s visuals closer to the style of version 1.5.2 and earlier versions.
body:
# Retro 1.5.2 Minecraft Vibes

Hello! I'm Vini, a Minecraft enthusiast. I created this Resource Pack for my personal enjoyment and decided to share it with the community. All credits go to the original authors of the resources used.

I made this pack because I missed the nostalgic vibes of older Minecraft versions and wanted to bring a bit of that classic feel back. I hope you enjoy it as much as I do!

![1.5.2 minecraft player computer screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e0d1af90806afcfc42bd8269524477c3ac2f312.jpeg)

!["Steve is back from vacations" -Murshtin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fbc40e2d02890b0bfb93ca02310788a527b1db1.jpeg)

# Changes By Modpack

- Programmer Art Ultimate:
  - Sounds: Door and Trapdoor sounds, Blocks, Ores (Old and New Blocks) and much more and being constantly updated.
- Vanilla Tweaks:
  - UI: Brings the classic main menu dirt background, Blue Buttons Hightlight, No Java Edition Subtitle, Classic Minecraft Logo.
  - Poppy Renamed to Rose, Old Water, Old Lava, Old Lapis, Old Sponge, Oarless Boats.
- Load Animation:
  - Old Mojang Load Animation.


# (Recommended) OptiFine

OptiFine is required in order to show the old mojang loading logo because it's used as dependency to build up the loading screen colors. You will still be able to use other features from the resource pack.

Download: https://optifine.net/home

# Additional

Additional suggestions to increase your immersion with this resource pack.

## Legacy World Creation Loading

This is not required for the Resource Pack but it's nice! This is a mod for changing the world load screen to the old version, just keep in mind that in order to work you will need either:
- Stop using OptiFine and use a mod loader;
- Combine OptiFine usage with a mod loader.

![not official project that brings the classic world generation minecraft loading screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44edee086ed4dbd805054d14b7171f4d912a9794.png)

Download:
[https://modrinth.com/mod/old-loading-progress-bar/version/cAUSNGK6](https://modrinth.com/mod/old-loading-progress-bar/version/cAUSNGK6)

## Legacy Minecraft Launcher

If you want more nostalgic immersion then you may like "olauncher" project. Please, use it at your own discretion, I'm not responsible for anything related to this software.

![not official project a clone of the legacy launcher of minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0ea115ce04865cc97d4a0c84ad2c0d72ff38e5e.png)

Download:
[https://github.com/olauncher/olauncher/releases/latest](https://github.com/olauncher/olauncher/releases/latest)

# License
Please note that this is not a creation, modification, or adaptation. It is merely a compilation of existing Resource Packs to create a retro style. I do not own the mentioned work, and all credits go to the original authors.

This project follows the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivatives 4.0 International (CC BY-NC-ND 4.0) license (the same license used by the "Programmer Art Ultimate" Resource Pack).

# Credits
This Resource Pack makes use of the following Resource Packs: "Programmer Art Ultimate", "2011 Loading Screen" and "Vanilla Tweaks" with their respective links and information displayed below.

## Programmer Art Ultimate
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/programmer-art-ultimate](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/programmer-art-ultimate)

A Resource Pack that brings the new blocks, items, and some mobs back to the old style of 1.8!

## 2011 Loading Screen
[https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/2011-loading-screen-with-loading-bar/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/2011-loading-screen-with-loading-bar/)

Are you ready for some Nostalgia? Turn back the time, and start Minecraft as if it was still in its Beta phase. This Loading Screen could be seen from Beta 1.8 (2011) to Version 1.7.3 (2013)

## Vanilla Tweaks
[vanillatweaks.net](vanillatweaks.net)

The website includes a picker with which you can create your very own collection of tweaks to be included in your game. You pick and choose, we do the rest!

# Contact

You can find me on likedin by here [linkedin.com/in/monambike/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/monambike/). If you want to see videos about my work you can check my YouTube channel [youtube.com/@monambike_portfolio](https://www.youtube.com/@monambike_portfolio) and if you want to see my artworks you can check at my instagram [instagram.com/monambike_portfolio](https://www.instagram.com/monambike_portfolio).
You can also message me to talk about compatibility issues but please be patient, I've made this more to myself and wanted to share with the public.
